content: create a website about how cool frogs are
I'll have the team build a fun static website about frogs — cool facts, maybe some nice styling, and a few interactive bits to make it engaging.

@Coder ## Project Restatement

Build a single-page static website about frogs. It should have a hero section with a catchy title, multiple content sections covering frog species, abilities, and habitats, a nature-inspired color palette, and at least one interactive element like a carousel or animation. Everything must be self-contained with no external dependencies.

## Project Type

`type: static`

## File Plan

- `index.html` - Main page with all sections (hero, species, abilities, habitats), embedded CSS, and interactive frog fact carousel
- `style.css` - Nature/frog color palette styling, hover effects, and animations
- `script.js` - Interactive elements: frog fact carousel, hover effects, and simple animations
- `test.html` - Simple test page to verify the site loads and interactive elements work
